component.name: ContentItem
component.script:
sub Init() m.background = m.top.findNode("background") m.focusBorder = m.top.findNode("focusBorder") m.poster = m.top.findNode("poster") m.title = m.top.findNode("title") m.ratingGroup = m.top.findNode("ratingGroup") m.rating = m.top.findNode("rating") m.newBadge = m.top.findNode("newBadge") m.progressBg = m.top.findNode("progressBg") m.progressBar = m.top.findNode("progressBar") end sub
sub showContent() content = m.top.itemContent if content = invalid then return
' Set title m.title.text = content.title
' Set poster image if content.hdPosterUrl <> invalid and content.hdPosterUrl <> "" m.poster.uri = content.hdPosterUrl else if content.SDPosterUrl <> invalid and content.SDPosterUrl <> "" m.poster.uri = content.SDPosterUrl else if content.posterUrl <> invalid and content.posterUrl <> "" m.poster.uri = content.posterUrl end if
' Set rating if available if content.rating <> invalid and content.rating <> "" and content.rating <> "0" m.rating.text = content.rating m.ratingGroup.visible = true else m.ratingGroup.visible = false end if
' Show progress bar if watching if content.progressPercent <> invalid and content.progressPercent > 0 m.progressBg.visible = true m.progressBar.visible = true m.progressBar.width = 160 * (content.progressPercent / 100.0) else m.progressBg.visible = false m.progressBar.visible = false end if end sub
sub onFocusPercentChange() focusPercent = m.top.focusPercent if focusPercent > 0.5 m.focusBorder.opacity = 1.0 m.background.color = "0x2E319244" else m.focusBorder.opacity = 0.0 m.background.color = "0x1a1a2eFF" end if end sub
